name: Chocolate Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 Egg (plus enough lukewarm water to equal 3/4 cup)
2 1/4 cups Gold Medal Better for Bread flour
1 1/2 teaspoons Active dry yeast (or 1 teaspoon Bread machine yeast)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the egg and lukewarm water until combined.
2. Add sugar, softened margarine/butter, salt, and vanilla to the wet mixture. Stir until smooth.
3. Gradually add flour, dried milk, chocolate chips, walnut halves, and yeast (or bread machine yeast) to the wet mixture. Mix until a dough forms.
4. Turn off the heat and let the dough rise in a warm place for about 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
